highlights.text: I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “My general lean is ES can do some retracing/consolidating after todays rally (entries discussed above) then head to 6904 range resistance.” Today, we made our way down to 6813 range support.
Readers know I trade mostly one setup: The Failed Breakdown, and we’ve seen it lots.
Failed Breakdowns start usually when price goes elevator down in a vertical flush cutting through every support.

As always, the gap down will result in a Failed Breakdown/squeeze but I would not hold any size over the weekend.” This was highly prescient, and on early Saturday morning, this risk materialized and we gapped down Sunday 45 points.
Like all gap downs/elevator down sells in ES though, this did not take long to see a Failed Breakdown and rip.
I’ll go over today’s Failed Breakdowns (these are key to know), and I’ll discuss the actionable plan for tomorrow.

post_title: SPX Continues To Coil In A Range. Is a Breakout Close? March 6 Plan
